description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a skeletonized stock and a short barrel, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The body is adorned with a dark, patterned finish that includes orange and gold geometric motifs, giving it a distinctive, modern appearance. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The top rail supports iron sights, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The stock is lightweight and open, reducing weight while maintaining structural integrity. The muzzle is simple, lacking any visible suppressor or compensator.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, patterned dark finish, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, iron sights, and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the patterned finish, skeletonized stock, detachable magazine, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open structure of the stock and the alignment of the upper rail and sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same patterned finish, magazine, and ergonomic grip details as the left side.
